sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65208" key="mataiolo/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰταιο-λόγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n65208.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">talking at random</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0377.tlg001:1:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Telest.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.9</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg017.perseus-grc1:1:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ep.Tit.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.10</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:301:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">301.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
